sourceSummary.oneLine: Schematic source for SW and OLED circuitry with VCC_3V3, OLED_VCC, buttons, LEDs, and I2C signal connections.
sourceSummary.officialUse: DHF electrical design schematic for SW&OLED circuitry.
keyPoints: The schematic date block states Wednesday, July 23, 2025.
Power nets shown include VCC_3V3 and OLED_VCC.
Switch components SW1 and SW2 are identified as PTS526SMG15SMTR21 LFS.
OLED connector CON1 is labeled OLED0.91 with pins including SCL, SDA, IREF, VCOMH, and VCC.
Signals shown include PWR_BUTTON, AP_BUTTON, AP_BOTTON, PWR_LED, ST_LED, I2C#B_SCL_OUT, and I2C#B_SDA_OUT.

evidence.claim: The source is an SW_OLED schematic in the DHF electrical design SW&OLED schematic folder.
The schematic date shown is Wednesday, July 23, 2025.
